insert.if:
INSERT INTO ORG_PERSON_MNECODE (ID, ROW_VERSION, LANGUAGE, MNE_CODE, PERSON_ID, PERSON_NAME, CREATOR, MODIFIER, CREATE_STAFF_ID, MODIFY_STAFF_ID)
select #{item.id}, #{item.rowVersion}, #{item.language}, #{item.mneCode}, #{item.personId}, #{item.personName}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createStaffId}, #{item.modifyStaffId} from dual

INSERT INTO ORG_PERSON_MNECODE (ID, ROW_VERSION, LANGUAGE, MNE_CODE, PERSON_ID, PERSON_NAME, CREATOR, MODIFIER, CREATE_STAFF_ID, MODIFY_STAFF_ID) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.rowVersion}, #{item.language}, #{item.mneCode}, #{item.personId}, #{item.personName}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createStaffId}, #{item.modifyStaffId} )

select.if: select count(id) from org_person_mnecode where length(MNE_CODE) != lengthb(MNE_CODE)
select count(id) from org_person_mnecode where length(MNE_CODE) != char_length(MNE_CODE)
select count(id) from org_person_mnecode where len(MNE_CODE) != datalength(MNE_CODE)
